def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    threshold = params['threshold']
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_period)
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period).average_true_range()
    df['price_change'] = df['close'].diff()
    df['signal'] = 0
    df.loc[(df['rsi'] > 70) & (df['price_change'] < -threshold * df['atr']), 'signal'] = -1
    df.loc[(df['rsi'] < 30) & (df['price_change'] > threshold * df['atr']), 'signal'] = 1
    return df['signal'].astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits momentum reversal tendencies when RSI indicates overbought/oversold conditions and price change exceeds a threshold multiple of ATR.
